entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Give me a harder version after I try."
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Opportunity cost"
"Should a company enter this market?"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "ከፈተናዬ፣ ፕሮጀክቴ ወይም ዕለታዊ ሕይወቴ ምሳሌዎችን ተጠቀም።"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
End with a recap you write yourself.
For Socratic Instruction, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: ለSocratic Instruction፣ ጠቃሚ የልምምድ ዑደት ይህ ነው፦

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: ለዚህ ሁነታ ሥራው ቀላል ነው፦ መልሶችን በተገብሮ ከማንበብ ይልቅ በተተኮሩ ጥያቄዎች፣ ፍንጮች እና ማሰላሰል ይማሩ።

entries.source: Foundations
Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: ጥሩ ጥያቄ መነሻዎች ብዙ ጊዜ ሦስት ነገሮችን ያካትታሉ፦ የትምህርት ርዕሱን፣ የአሁኑን ደረጃዎን እና የሚፈልጉትን የእገዛ ዓይነት። ፍጹም ቃላት አያስፈልጉዎትም። ክፍለ ጊዜው እንዲጀምር በቂ አውድ ብቻ ያስፈልግዎታል።

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: መልሱ በጣም ሰፊ ከመሰለ፣ ያጥብቁት። አንድ ምሳሌ፣ አንድ የተሳሳተ ግንዛቤ፣ አንድ የማረጋገጫ ጥያቄ ወይም አንድ ቀጣይ ደረጃ ይጠይቁ። በጣም ቀላል ከመሰለ፣ ፈተና ይጠይቁ። በጣም ከባድ ከመሰለ፣ ከሚያውቁት ነገር የሚጀምር ድልድይ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Socratic Instruction on inspir.
entries.value: በinspir ላይ Socratic Instruction ጠቃሚ የመማር ውጤት እንዲሰጥ የፕሮምፕት ሐሳቦች እና ሊደገም የሚችል የጥናት ዑደት።

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: የኤአይ መልስ ማንበብ መማር አይደለም። ከመጀመሪያው መልስ በኋላ፣ ሁነታው ከሐሳቡ ጋር አንድ ነገር እንዲያደርጉ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: እርግጠኛ ባልሆነው ክፍል ላይ ግብረመልስ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Socratic Instruction prompts and study loop
entries.value: የSocratic Instruction ጥያቄ መነሻዎች እና የጥናት ዑደት

entries.source: Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: ያ የመጨረሻ ማጠቃለያ አስፈላጊ ነው። ሐሳቡን መልሰው ሲያብራሩ፣ ምን ጠንካራ እንደሆነ እና ምን አሁንም ከAI የተዋሰ እንደሆነ ይገልጣሉ።

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: ምርጥ የመማር ክፍለ-ጊዜዎች ሊስተካከሉ የሚችሉ ናቸው። አስተማሪው በአንድ ጊዜ አንድ ጥያቄ ይጠይቃል፣ ምክንያትዎን ይጠብቃል፣ እና እስኪሞክሩ ድረስ አያዋህድም።

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Socratic Instruction is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: ከSocratic Instruction ጠቃሚ ውጤት ለማግኘት ፈጣኑ መንገድ ለኤአይው ርዕስ ብቻ ሳይሆን የመማር ሥራ መስጠት ነው። ርዕስ የሚስብዎትን ይናገራል፤ የመማር ሥራ ደግሞ ምን ዓይነት እርዳታ እንደሚፈልጉ ይናገራል።

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: ከዚያ ክፍለ-ጊዜውን የበለጠ ግላዊ የሚያደርግ ገደብ ያክሉ፦

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Socratic Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Learn Anything. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction ለዚህ ሥራ ትክክለኛው ሁነታ ሲሆን ይጠቀሙበት። ተዛማጅ መንገድ ከፈለጉ፣ Learn Anythingን ይሞክሩ። እንዲሁም ስለ ጥናት ዘዴዎች፣ Socratic መማር፣ ፍላሽካርዶች፣ ሚና ጨዋታ እና ንቁ ማስታወስ የኤአይ መማር ብሎግን ማሰስ ይችላሉ።
